Source revision
a8b083705553550eda289ddf9cf1d028df907682

Acta v0.2.0 record · Generated from accepted canonical state (figures/tag-filter-sheet.md) after explicit acceptance (chat 2026-07-23 — per-figure verdicts pasted and confirmed) · Never generated from browser state.

checklist record · ACCEPTED

Tag-filter figure sheet — two approved, one revised

The data-flow and decision figures are approved for the documentation; the module-seams figure returns for revision with lighter dependency annotation.

Sheet verdicts

Decision figure-sheet

The data-flow and decision figures are approved for the documentation; the module-seams figure returns for revision with lighter dependency annotation.

Rationale: Data-flow and decision read at a glance; the seams arrow annotation needs less weight.. Accepted via chat 2026-07-23 — explicit confirmation.

Revision notes

Seams figure: thin the side arrow and mute its labels; the layers themselves are right.

Figures

01URL to DOM, in one line Approve

Three boxes in a row — the URL parameter, the pure functions, and the catalog DOM — connected by two arrows; the pure middle box is emphasized.

The whole feature is one left-to-right sentence: URL in, pure functions, DOM out.

SVG source 
<svg viewBox="0 0 640 180" role="img" aria-labelledby="fig-t-fig-dataflow fig-d-fig-dataflow" class="a2-figure">
<title id="fig-t-fig-dataflow">Tag filtering: URL to DOM</title>
<desc id="fig-d-fig-dataflow">Three boxes in a row — the URL parameter, the pure functions, and the catalog DOM — connected by two arrows; the pure middle box is emphasized.</desc>
<rect x="24" y="58" width="168" height="64" rx="12" fill="var(--acta-paper)" stroke="var(--acta-rule-strong)" stroke-width="1.5"></rect>
<text x="108" y="85" font-size="13" font-weight="600" text-anchor="middle" fill="var(--acta-ink)">?tag=git</text>
<text x="108" y="103" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" fill="var(--acta-ink-muted)">the only state</text>
<polyline points="192,90 232,90" fill="none" stroke="var(--acta-rule-strong)" stroke-width="1.5"></polyline>
<polygon points="239,90 229,85 229,95" fill="var(--acta-rule-strong)"></polygon>
<rect x="240" y="46" width="176" height="88" rx="12" fill="var(--acta-action-tint)" stroke="var(--acta-action)" stroke-width="1.5"></rect>
<text x="328" y="78" font-size="13" font-weight="600" text-anchor="middle" fill="var(--acta-ink)">parse → filter</text>
<text x="328" y="96" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" fill="var(--acta-ink-muted)">pure functions</text>
<text x="328" y="114" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" fill="var(--acta-ink-muted)">tested in Node</text>
<polyline points="416,90 456,90" fill="none" stroke="var(--acta-rule-strong)" stroke-width="1.5"></polyline>
<polygon points="463,90 453,85 453,95" fill="var(--acta-rule-strong)"></polygon>
<rect x="464" y="58" width="152" height="64" rx="12" fill="#22252B" stroke="#22252B" stroke-width="1.5"></rect>
<text x="540" y="85" font-size="13" font-weight="600" text-anchor="middle" fill="#E7E5DE">catalog DOM</text>
<text x="540" y="103" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" fill="#9DA2AC">replaceChildren</text>
<text x="24" y="30" font-size="11" fill="var(--acta-ink-muted)">every navigation, including back/forward, replays this line</text>
</svg>

02The one branch Approve

A diamond asks whether any skill carries the requested tag; yes leads to the matching rows, no leads to the explain-and-suggest empty state.

The flow's only decision: known tags render rows, unknown tags render the accepted empty state.

SVG source 
<svg viewBox="0 0 640 250" role="img" aria-labelledby="fig-t-fig-decision fig-d-fig-decision" class="a2-figure">
<title id="fig-t-fig-decision">Unknown tags are a state, not an error</title>
<desc id="fig-d-fig-decision">A diamond asks whether any skill carries the requested tag; yes leads to the matching rows, no leads to the explain-and-suggest empty state.</desc>
<polygon points="320,22 408,68 320,114 232,68" fill="var(--acta-warning-tint)" stroke="var(--acta-warning)" stroke-width="1.5"></polygon>
<text x="320" y="64" font-size="13" font-weight="600" text-anchor="middle" fill="var(--acta-ink)">any skill</text>
<text x="320" y="80" font-size="13" font-weight="600" text-anchor="middle" fill="var(--acta-ink)">tagged this?</text>
<polyline points="268,95 176,140 176,158" fill="none" stroke="var(--acta-positive)" stroke-width="1.5"></polyline>
<polygon points="176,165 171,155 181,155" fill="var(--acta-positive)"></polygon>
<text x="200" y="128" font-size="11" font-weight="600" fill="var(--acta-positive)">yes</text>
<polyline points="372,95 464,140 464,158" fill="none" stroke="var(--acta-danger)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="5 4"></polyline>
<polygon points="464,165 459,155 469,155" fill="var(--acta-danger)"></polygon>
<text x="428" y="128" font-size="11" font-weight="600" fill="var(--acta-danger)">no</text>
<rect x="84" y="166" width="184" height="60" rx="12" fill="var(--acta-positive-tint)" stroke="var(--acta-positive)" stroke-width="1.5"></rect>
<text x="176" y="192" font-size="12.5" font-weight="600" text-anchor="middle" fill="var(--acta-ink)">matching rows</text>
<text x="176" y="209" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" fill="var(--acta-ink-muted)">order preserved</text>
<rect x="360" y="166" width="208" height="60" rx="12" fill="var(--acta-danger-tint)" stroke="var(--acta-danger)" stroke-width="1.5"></rect>
<text x="464" y="192" font-size="12.5" font-weight="600" text-anchor="middle" fill="var(--acta-ink)">empty state</text>
<text x="464" y="209" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" fill="var(--acta-ink-muted)">explains + suggests tags</text>
</svg>

03Module seams Needs revision

Three stacked layers — browser glue on top, pure core in the middle, static baseline at the bottom — with a single downward dependency arrow beside them.

Each layer depends only on the one below it; the static page at the bottom depends on nothing.

SVG source 
<svg viewBox="0 0 640 260" role="img" aria-labelledby="fig-t-fig-seams fig-d-fig-seams" class="a2-figure">
<title id="fig-t-fig-seams">Dependency direction of the tag filter</title>
<desc id="fig-d-fig-seams">Three stacked layers — browser glue on top, pure core in the middle, static baseline at the bottom — with a single downward dependency arrow beside them.</desc>
<rect x="140" y="24" width="400" height="56" rx="12" fill="var(--acta-action-tint)" stroke="var(--acta-action)" stroke-width="1.5"></rect>
<text x="340" y="48" font-size="13" font-weight="600" text-anchor="middle" fill="var(--acta-ink)">src/app.mjs</text>
<text x="340" y="66" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" fill="var(--acta-ink-muted)">browser glue — the only DOM writer</text>
<rect x="140" y="100" width="400" height="56" rx="12" fill="var(--acta-paper)" stroke="var(--acta-rule-strong)" stroke-width="1.5"></rect>
<text x="340" y="124" font-size="13" font-weight="600" text-anchor="middle" fill="var(--acta-ink)">catalog.mjs · url-tag.mjs</text>
<text x="340" y="142" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" fill="var(--acta-ink-muted)">pure core — imported by tests and glue</text>
<rect x="140" y="176" width="400" height="56" rx="12" fill="var(--acta-tint)" stroke="var(--acta-rule-strong)" stroke-width="1.5"></rect>
<text x="340" y="200" font-size="13" font-weight="600" text-anchor="middle" fill="var(--acta-ink)">index.html</text>
<text x="340" y="218" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" fill="var(--acta-ink-muted)">complete no-JS baseline</text>
<line x1="96" y1="36" x2="96" y2="212" stroke="var(--acta-rule-strong)" stroke-width="1.5"></line>
<polygon points="96,220 91,210 101,210" fill="var(--acta-rule-strong)"></polygon>
<text x="88" y="120" font-size="11" text-anchor="end" fill="var(--acta-ink-muted)">depends</text>
<text x="88" y="136" font-size="11" text-anchor="end" fill="var(--acta-ink-muted)">on ↓</text>
</svg>

Sources

  1. [E1] feature-xray record — verified system map
  2. [E2] interface-directions record — accepted empty state
  3. [E3] docs/architecture.md — module boundaries

Acta is a print-first engineering record. Fact = directly supported; Inference = reasoned from evidence; Simplification = deliberately reduced model. This record renders accepted canonical state only; open decisions live in the companion instrument.
